testcase.name: formatCurrency > formats whole numbers correctly
formatCurrency > formats decimal amounts
formatCurrency > handles zero
formatCurrency > handles null
formatCurrency > handles undefined
Work Orders Module > TEST 1: should load all work orders on page init
Work Orders Module > TEST 2: should create a new work order with valid input
Work Orders Module > TEST 3: should reject work order creation with missing fields
Work Orders Module > TEST 4: should update work order status when dragged to new column
Work Orders Module > TEST 5: should log status change to history table
Work Orders Module > TEST 6: should attach a part to a work order
Work Orders Module > TEST 7: should auto-deduct stock when part is attached
Work Orders Module > TEST 8: should increment quantity when attaching same part twice
Work Orders Module > TEST 9: should generate invoice when work order is marked completed
Work Orders Module > TEST 10: should calculate correct invoice total (labour + parts + tax)
Work Orders Module > TEST 11: should prevent duplicate work order creation
Work Orders Module > TEST 12: should retry work order operation on network failure
main.js UI behaviour > shows initials when a staff member has no profile photo
main.js UI behaviour > falls back to initials when a profile photo fails to load
main.js UI behaviour > filters table rows based on what the user types
main.js UI behaviour > switches the active settings pane when a different tab is selected
calcCommission — Paystack 5% split > 5% of ₦50,000 = ₦2,500 commission
calcCommission — Paystack 5% split > shop always gets 95%
calcCommission — Paystack 5% split > zero invoice amount
calcKobo — Naira to kobo conversion > ₦10,500 = 1,050,000 kobo (monthly plan)
calcKobo — Naira to kobo conversion > ₦90,000 = 9,000,000 kobo (annual plan)
isLowStock > flags part at exactly threshold as low stock
isLowStock > flags part below threshold
isLowStock > does not flag part above threshold
isLowStock > flags zero stock
classifyTurnover — inventory reports > 0 uses = Dead Stock
classifyTurnover — inventory reports > 1–2 uses = Slow Mover
classifyTurnover — inventory reports > 3–5 uses = Medium Mover
classifyTurnover — inventory reports > 6+ uses = Fast Mover
calcStockDeficit > returns shortfall when below threshold
calcStockDeficit > returns 0 when stock is sufficient
calculateInvoice > calculates labour + parts + tax correctly
calculateInvoice > handles zero labour hours
calculateInvoice > handles zero tax rate
calculateInvoice > handles no parts attached
calculateInvoice > rounds to 2 decimal places
normalisePhone — Nigerian number formatting > converts 0801... to 2348...
normalisePhone — Nigerian number formatting > strips the + from +234...
normalisePhone — Nigerian number formatting > strips spaces
normalisePhone — Nigerian number formatting > strips dashes
normalisePhone — Nigerian number formatting > leaves already-normalised number unchanged
billing plan rules > keeps Starter plan at 5 users with core features only
billing plan rules > keeps Pro plan at 25 users with reports and online payments
billing plan rules > formats resource limits using user-friendly labels
billing plan rules > blocks new staff creation once Starter has reached 5 active users
billing plan rules > allows more staff when the shop is on an active Pro plan
main.js shared helpers > builds initials from first and last name
main.js shared helpers > returns a placeholder when no name is available
main.js shared helpers > formats naira values consistently for dashboards and invoices
main.js shared helpers > increments generated ids from the highest existing record
